send-one-way-request.set-body: @{ var evt = new JObject( new JProperty("events", new JArray( new JObject( new JProperty("customerId", context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : "unknown"), new JProperty("metricName", context.Request.Method + " " + (context.Operation != null ? context.Operation.UrlTemplate : context.Request.Url.Path)), new JProperty("quantity", 1), new JProperty("idempotencyKey", context.RequestId), new JProperty("occurredAt", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")), new JProperty("metadata", new JObject( new JProperty("gateway", "azure-apim"), new JProperty("method", context.Request.Method), new JProperty("path", context.Operation != null ? context.Operation.UrlTemplate : context.Request.Url.Path), new JProperty("status", context.Response.StatusCode), new JProperty("latency", context.Elapsed.TotalMilliseconds), new JProperty("product", context.Product != null ? context.Product.Id : ""), new JProperty("subscription", context.Subscription != null ? context.Subscription.Id : ""), new JProperty("operation", context.Operation != null ? context.Operation.Id : ""), new JProperty("user", context.User != null ? context.User.Id : "") )) ) )) ); return evt.ToString(); }
